'''ât-l-b''' ('''talaba''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:fineer|fineer]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-l-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fineer|fineer]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ât-l-b
|-
! Lemma
| talaba
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:talabithi|talabithi]] || [[word:talabiji|talabiji]] || [[word:talabishi|talabishi]] || [[word:talabi|talabi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:talabuthuth|talabuthuth]] || [[word:talabujuj|talabujuj]] || [[word:talabushush|talabushush]] || [[word:talab|talab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:talabuthu|talabuthu]] || [[word:talabuju|talabuju]] || [[word:talabushu|talabushu]] || [[word:talabu|talabu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:talabufuth|talabufuth]] || [[word:talabufuj|talabufuj]] || [[word:talabufush|talabufush]] || [[word:talabuf|talabuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:talabethe|talabethe]] || [[word:talabeje|talabeje]] || [[word:talabeshe|talabeshe]] || [[word:talabe|talabe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:talabothoth|talabothoth]] || [[word:talabojoj|talabojoj]] || [[word:talaboshosh|talaboshosh]] || [[word:talab|talab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:talabotho|talabotho]] || [[word:talabojo|talabojo]] || [[word:talabosho|talabosho]] || [[word:talabo|talabo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:talabofoth|talabofoth]] || [[word:talabofoj|talabofoj]] || [[word:talabofosh|talabofosh]] || [[word:talabof|talabof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:talabĂŠthĂŠ|talabĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:talabĂŠjĂŠ|talabĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:talabĂŠshĂŠ|talabĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:talabĂŠ|talabĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:talabathath|talabathath]] || [[word:talabajaj|talabajaj]] || [[word:talabashash|talabashash]] || [[word:talab|talab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:talabatha|talabatha]] || [[word:talabaja|talabaja]] || [[word:talabasha|talabasha]] || [[word:talaba|talaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:talabafath|talabafath]] || [[word:talabafaj|talabafaj]] || [[word:talabafash|talabafash]] || [[word:talabaf|talabaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:talabasha|talabasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gotalabasha|gotalabasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokitalabasha|gokitalabasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:talabnĂŒsha|talabnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gotalabnknĂŒsha|gotalabnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokitalabnĂŒsha|gokitalabnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:talabshĂ«sha|talabshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotalabnkshĂ«sha|gotalabnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitalabshĂ«sha|gokitalabshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:talabrosha|talabrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotalabnkrosha|gotalabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokitalabrosha|gokitalabrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:talabmusha|talabmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gotalabnkmusha|gotalabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitalabmusha|gokitalabmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:talabsherasha|talabsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gotalabnksherasha|gotalabnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokitalabsherasha|gokitalabsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:talabngasha|talabngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gotalabnkngasha|gotalabnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokitalabngasha|gokitalabngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:talabyasha|talabyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gotalabnkyasha|gotalabnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokitalabyasha|gokitalabyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:talabyamasha|talabyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gotalabnkyamasha|gotalabnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokitalabyamasha|gokitalabyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:talabnĂŒshĂ«sha|talabnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gotalabnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gotalabnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokitalabnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokitalabnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:talabnĂŒrosha|talabnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotalabnknĂŒrosha|gotalabnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokitalabnĂŒrosha|gokitalabnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:talabnĂŒmusha|talabnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotalabnknĂŒmusha|gotalabnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitalabnĂŒmusha|gokitalabnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:talabshĂ«nĂŒsha|talabshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gotalabnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gotalabnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokitalabshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokitalabshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:talabshĂ«rosha|talabshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotalabnkshĂ«rosha|gotalabnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokitalabshĂ«rosha|gokitalabshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:talabshĂ«musha|talabshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotalabnkshĂ«musha|gotalabnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitalabshĂ«musha|gokitalabshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:talabronĂŒsha|talabronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gotalabnkronĂŒsha|gotalabnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokitalabronĂŒsha|gokitalabronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:talabroshĂ«sha|talabroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gotalabnkroshĂ«sha|gotalabnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokitalabroshĂ«sha|gokitalabroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:talabromusha|talabromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotalabnkromusha|gotalabnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitalabromusha|gokitalabromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:talabmunĂŒsha|talabmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gotalabnkmunĂŒsha|gotalabnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokitalabmunĂŒsha|gokitalabmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:talabmushĂ«sha|talabmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gotalabnkmushĂ«sha|gotalabnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokitalabmushĂ«sha|gokitalabmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:talabmurosha|talabmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotalabnkmurosha|gotalabnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokitalabmurosha|gokitalabmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:talab|talab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:tĂŠlĂŠb|tĂŠlĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hotalab|hotalab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hotĂŠlĂŠb|hotĂŠlĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohotalab|hohotalab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohotĂŠlĂŠb|hohotĂŠlĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒtalab|nĂŒtalab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒtĂŠlĂŠb|nĂŒtĂŠlĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒtalab|nĂŒnĂŒtalab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒtĂŠlĂŠb|nĂŒnĂŒtĂŠlĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻtalab|nĂŻtalab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻtĂŠlĂŠb|nĂŻtĂŠlĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻtalab|nĂŻnĂŻtalab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻtĂŠlĂŠb|nĂŻnĂŻtĂŠlĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lutalab|lutalab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lutĂŠlĂŠb|lutĂŠlĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulutalab|lulutalab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulutĂŠlĂŠb|lulutĂŠlĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:litalab|litalab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:litĂŠlĂŠb|litĂŠlĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilitalab|lilitalab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilitĂŠlĂŠb|lilitĂŠlĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kotalab|kotalab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kotĂŠlĂŠb|kotĂŠlĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokotalab|kokotalab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokotĂŠlĂŠb|kokotĂŠlĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:ketalab|ketalab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ketĂŠlĂŠb|ketĂŠlĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:keketalab|keketalab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:keketĂŠlĂŠb|keketĂŠlĂŠb]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
